requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — In-Scope LED Lamps (GEMS / MEPS)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——纳入范围的 LED 灯（GEMS / MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——納入範圍的 LED 燈（GEMS / MEPS）

summary.en: Some LED lamps, including lamps supplied with or as part of a luminaire when the lamp is in scope, must meet the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (LED Lamps) Determination 2025. The mandatory obligation is the GEMS Act and the LED Lamps Determination, not a voluntary test standard alone. In-scope LED lamp models must meet MEPS, satisfy mandatory packaging and information requirements, hold test reports, and be registered in the Energy Rating Product Registration System before sale or supply unless a valid grandfathering provision applies.
summary.zh: 部分 LED 灯，包括随灯具供应或作为灯具组成部分且该灯纳入范围的产品，须符合《2025 年温室气体与能源最低标准（LED 灯）决定》。强制义务来自 GEMS 法案及 LED 灯决定，而非单独的自愿测试标准。纳入范围的 LED 灯型号须满足 MEPS、强制包装和信息要求，持有检测报告，并在销售或供应前于 Energy Rating Product Registration System 注册，除非适用有效的存量过渡条款。
summary.zht: 部分 LED 燈，包括隨燈具供應或作為燈具組成部分且該燈納入範圍的產品，須符合《2025 年溫室氣體與能源最低標準（LED 燈）決定》。強制義務來自 GEMS 法案及 LED 燈決定，而非單獨的自願測試標準。納入範圍的 LED 燈型號須滿足 MEPS、強制包裝和資訊要求，持有檢測報告，並在銷售或供應前於 Energy Rating Product Registration System 註冊，除非適用有效的存量過渡條款。

standards_or_laws: Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012
Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (LED Lamps) Determination 2025

summary.en: China uses energy-efficiency standards and labels for relevant lighting products, including GB energy-efficiency requirements for LED lamps and luminaires depending on category. China energy labels or domestic test reports do not create Australian GEMS registration and cannot replace the Australian determination's test, MEPS, packaging, and record requirements.
summary.zh: 中国对相关照明产品使用能效标准和能效标识，包括视类别适用的 LED 灯及灯具 GB 能效要求。中国能效标识或国内检测报告不会形成澳大利亚 GEMS 注册，也不能替代澳大利亚决定中的测试、MEPS、包装和记录要求。
summary.zht: 中國對相關照明產品使用能效標準和能效標識，包括視類別適用的 LED 燈及燈具 GB 能效要求。中國能效標識或國內檢測報告不會形成澳洲 GEMS 註冊，也不能替代澳洲決定中的測試、MEPS、包裝和記錄要求。

standards_or_laws: China energy efficiency standards and energy label rules for applicable LED lighting products

gap.en: The Australian GEMS LED lamp scope is not identical to China energy-label scope. Exporters must identify whether the replaceable lamp, integrated non-replaceable light source, or supplied lamp package is captured by the LED Lamps Determination, then prepare the specific GEMS registration data, packaging information, MEPS evidence, and photobiological hazard test reports required by the determination.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚 GEMS LED 灯范围与中国能效标识范围并不相同。出口商须识别可更换灯、不可更换集成光源或随附灯包是否被 LED 灯决定纳入，并准备该决定要求的具体 GEMS 注册数据、包装信息、MEPS 证据及光生物危害测试报告。
gap.zht: 澳洲 GEMS LED 燈範圍與中國能效標識範圍並不相同。出口商須識別可更換燈、不可更換集成光源或隨附燈包是否被 LED 燈決定納入，並準備該決定要求的具體 GEMS 註冊資料、包裝資訊、MEPS 證據及光生物危害測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope LED lamps — GEMS registration, MEPS, test reports, and packaging/information duties under the GEMS Act and LED Lamps Determination 2025
mandatory_status.cn: Product-dependent — China energy efficiency standards and labels apply according to domestic product category

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GEMS/MEPS applies to in-scope LED lamps, not every luminaire as a whole. Check the product configuration and register covered LED lamp models before Australian supply from the applicable commencement date.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】GEMS/MEPS 适用于纳入范围的 LED 灯，并非所有灯具整体均适用。应核查产品配置，并在适用生效日期后供应澳大利亚市场前注册被覆盖的 LED 灯型号。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】GEMS/MEPS 適用於納入範圍的 LED 燈，並非所有燈具整體均適用。應核查產品配置，並在適用生效日期後供應澳洲市場前註冊被覆蓋的 LED 燈型號。
